special_mechanics.name: Run and Gun
special_mechanics.description: RoboCop advances through stages with run-and-gun hybrid arcade gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: RoboCop starts with Auto-9 (unlimited ammunition) and can exchange weapons

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Wikipedia source contains only high-level gameplay descriptions. No numerical physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data documented for the NES version. Source identifies game as 'run and gun' and 'beat 'em up hybrid arcade game' but provides no technical movement specifications.
